text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I bring <chrname> to<n>the
infirmary for a checkup.
Oh! A custo―I mean, a student! Hello!

Are you hurt? Sick? Stressed?<n>Whatever it is, I
treat it all!

Well, considering you're at the<n>academy infirmary,
I'd say that<n>makes me your trusty school nurse!
Yup, just your average school<n>employee!

Ahaha! Guess there's no fooling you.<n>I suppose I
should start by giving you<n>my name.
Ahem! Allow me to introduce myself!

I am the (likely) savior of all<n>Umamusume, the
(self-proclaimed)<n>legendary acupuncturist with the
magic touch...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The one and only Sasami<n>Anshinzawa! See? No
worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Minha adivinhação matinal me disse<n>que a sétima
pessoa que eu<n>encontrasse traria má sorte... E
essa<n>pessoa seria você!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gosh! You sure seem worried! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
No matter! No matter! We've made<n>our
introductions, so lie down and let<n>me put these
needles to work!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O quê?! Nem a minha leitura matinal<n>das cenouras
previu que isso<n>aconteceria!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! No need to be scared! All<n>I'm going to do
is slip these<n>extraordinary needles precisely into
your chakra points.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then voilà, presto! Something<n>indescribable will
happen!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And let me assure you, there's<n>absolutely nothing
sketchy about this<n>at all! It's never gone anything
less<n>than perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...For my master.
choice_data_list: For your master?! What about for you?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't fret! This is my first time, so<n>technically,
I've never failed a patient<n>either!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And it's not like I have no<n>experience! I spent ten
years under a<n>legendary master, fetching dri—I
mean, training!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: See? No worries! ☆
choice_data_list: (We need to get outta here, stat!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's no way we're doing this. I<n>take
<chrname> and head for<n>the door, when...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You're Matikanefukukitaru, right?!<n>The super pure
follower of the great<n>Shiraoki, always on the
search for<n>good fortune!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Have I heard of her? Of course I<n>have! I'm a big
fan!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why I'm here! To<n>give you my
support! Let me help<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Just give me a chance! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm... O pedido dela é tão sincero<n>quanto a mais
verdadeira das<n>orações feitas no santuário. Acho
que<n>não consigo resistir...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Please! Pretty please with a carrot on<n>top! I'll even
let you choose which<n>chakra I activate!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: I'm sure I won't mess up!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Well... pretty sure.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: I mean, it's on the sure side! That'sgood, right? Anyway, don't gethung up on the details!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Let's get to the good stuff! Whichchakra should I activate? Do youwant a boost to your abilities? Yourhealth? Or maybe your charm?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I smell danger in the air, but I figurethere might—and I emphasizemight—be a chance of gettingsomething special out of thistreatment.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: What should we do?
choice_data_list: This is too sketchy. Let's quit while we still can.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So you want me to<n>activate the
strength chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started! Are you<n>ready? There's no
going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, leave it to me! Time to locate<n>that chakra!
Ollie, ollie, oxen free!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Now, just relaaax... See? No worries!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aaand poke!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oof!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah! Treinador!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sinto a bênção divina de Shiraoki<n>dentro de mim! O
poder da fortuna flui<n>pelo meu corpo!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actuallyworked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a<n>total genius!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> is overflowing<n>with so much
power she's almost<n>unrecognizable!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Treinador...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Há uma força sombria e sinistra<n>dentro de mim...
Argh... Não estou me<n>sentindo muito bem...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s condition<n>deteriorates
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I<n>should get
going! Bye! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck. I'm
not the one suffering,<n>yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to<n>activate the
winning chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started! Are you<n>ready? There's no
going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, leave it to me! Time to locate<n>that chakra!
Ollie, ollie, oxen free!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Now, just relaaax... See? No worries!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aaand poke!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oof!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I feel the divine blessing of Shiraoki<n>within me! The
power of fortune<n>flows through my body!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actuallyworked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a<n>total genius!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can sense a huge improvement in
<chrname>'s skills!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Treinador...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:

Argh... Não estou me<n>sentindo muito bem...

<chrname>'s condition<n>deteriorates
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I<n>should get
going! Bye! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck. I'm
not the one suffering,<n>yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to<n>activate the health
chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started! Are you<n>ready? There's no
going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa

text_block_list.name: Monólogo

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I feel the divine blessing of Shiraoki<n>within me! The
power of fortune<n>flows through my body!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actuallyworked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a<n>total genius!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s entire body is<n>radiating a
healthy glow! She's the<n>absolute picture of health!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Treinador...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Há uma força sombria e sinistra<n>dentro de mim...
Argh... Não estou me<n>sentindo muito bem...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s condition<n>deteriorates
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa

going! Bye! ☆

I should've known better than to test<n>our luck. I'm
not the one suffering,<n>yet I'm full of regret.

chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started! Are you<n>ready? There's no
going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru

I feel the divine blessing of Shiraoki<n>within me! The
power of fortune<n>flows through my body!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gasp... You're kidding... It actuallyworked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No waaay! I can't believe it! I'm a<n>total genius!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> is overflowing<n>with charm!
She's bound to turn<n>heads everywhere she goes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This<n>is a great
leap toward achieving our<n>goal!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Treinador...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Há uma força sombria e sinistra<n>dentro de mim...
Argh... Não estou me<n>sentindo muito bem...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s condition<n>deteriorates
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: So... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I<n>should get
going! Bye! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test<n>our luck. I'm
not the one suffering,<n>yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aw, c'mon! Don't be like that!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! You there! I hope you knowtrespassers will be prosecuted!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gah! I've been found out!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'm outta here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, looks like turning her down<n>was the right
thing to do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Besides, who needs that<n>strange-looking magic
when I have<n>Shiraoki on my side!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious who this Anshinzawa<n>character really
is, but there's no use<n>ruminating over it. Best to
forget<n>about today and move on.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Had a change of heart, did you? No<n>worries, it
happens!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and tell me which chakra<n>you want me
to activate, then!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well?! Don't leave us in suspense!<n>Wait a
second... How long have I<n>been here?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! You there! I hope you knowtrespassers will be prosecuted!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gah! I've been found out!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'm outta here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The situation takes a sharp turn<n>before I can make
a decision.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
What was that all about?<n><chrname> and I
look at each<n>other in bewilderment.
